mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.name, s.mobile FROM staff s INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.user_id = CAST(s.id AS CHAR) AND ur.role_id = #{roleId} WHERE (s.deleted = 0 OR s.deleted IS NULL)
AND s.name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%')
ORDER BY s.add_time DESC, s.id DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role_id = #{roleId}
